stemHtml: Two aircraft are located on (arbitrary) different radials but at equal distances from a VOR-station. Which statement is true?

options.a: At a certain moment of time, both the phase of the reference signals and of the variable signals are unequal for both aircraft.
options.b: At a certain moment of time the phase of the reference signals is unequal and the phase of variable signals is equal for both aircraft.
options.c: At a certain moment of time, both the phase of the reference signals and of the variable signals are equal for both aircraft.
options.d: At a certain moment of time the phase of the reference signals is equal and the phase of variable signals is unequal for both aircraft.
